reviews.comment:
En esta YPF no dejan cargar un celular, apagan la luz con tal de no hacer el favor, terrible atención, los viajeros necesitamos cosas básicas como usar el baño (si está limpio) cargar el celular , cargar combustible y agua caliente, eso es lo fundamental.

(Translated by Google)
At this YPF station they won't let you charge your cell phone, they turn off the lights just to avoid doing you the favor, terrible service. Travelers need basic things like using the bathroom (if it's clean), charging their cell phones, refueling, and hot water; that's what's essential.

reviews.comment:
Pésima atención, el funcionario un ordinario de primera. Te dice que no hay baños para los clientes, siendo que los baños estaban abiertos ya que mi esposa ya había ido antes de que yo pretendiera ir y no me dejaran. Otra cosa... El tiempo de espera para cargar es una vergüenza, 1 hora para poner combustible, filas interminables y van tan lento que parece que lo hacen a propósito. Es un show de mal gusto. Filas de vehículos para cargar, muchos decidían irse, salvo los que no nos quedaba otra que cargar ahí ya que las estaciones son muy escazas a varios kilómetros.

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service, the attendant was incredibly rude. He told me there were no restrooms for customers, even though they were open because my wife had already gone before I tried to go and they wouldn't let me. Another thing... The wait time to fill up is a disgrace, an hour to get fuel, endless lines, and they go so slowly it seems like they're doing it on purpose. It's a tasteless spectacle. Lines of vehicles waiting to fill up, many decided to leave, except for those of us who had no other option but to fill up there since gas stations are very scarce for several kilometers.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4572994797407490123/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2t4Q01rSklTbXBrV21vd2NHNTFNa3hNUVZaS1MyYxAB
